analysis: The current project has a basic structure with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files for a website. The theme should focus on black holes, incorporating animated objects and slides. The existing CSS and HTML files need to be enhanced to reflect a cosmic theme with black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements. The JavaScript file should be updated to handle animations and interactions related to black holes.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including animations for black hole visuals, interactive planets, and slide transitions. Fix any syntax errors and ensure all event handlers are properly set up.
